cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Neuro-symbolic legal assistant: the LLM handles language understanding and cited explanation over Nigerian labour/tenancy/tax statutes, while a deterministic rules engine (PAYE tax bands, severance and notice-period computations encoded from statute) performs all calculations. A deterministic citation verifier checks every legal claim against the local corpus before display. Remove either component and the product breaks.

test_prompts.prompt: PLACEHOLDER — selected strategically in Week 6 per plan
